wikibase-publishing-error: Wax baa khaldamay markii isbeddelladaada la kaydinayay. Sug wax yar ka dibna mar kale isku day.
wikibase-setting-entitytermsview-showEnt: Muuji summadaha, magacyada kale iyo sharraxaadaha dhammaan luuqadahayga marka bogga la raro

Luuqadaha gaarka ah ee dheeraadka u ah luuqadda isdhexgalka isticmaalaha waxaa lagu dejin karaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo habka [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Extension:Babel|Kordhinta Babel]] ee bogga isticmaalaha.
wikibase-entityterms-languagelistview-mu: Cusub! Ku dar summadaha iyo magacyada kale ee caadiga ah dhammaan luuqadaha
Qiimayaasha caadiga ah waxaa loo isticmaalaa dhammaan luuqadaha leh summado iyo magacyo kale oo madhan si loo yareeyo ku celcelinta. [$1 Macluumaad dheeraad ah]
wikibase-description-edit-mul-not-applic: Suurtagal ma aha in dhammaan luuqadaha loo dejiyo sharraxaad caadi ah
wikibase-item-description-edit-not-suppo: Sharraxaadaha laguma taageero luuqaddan. Fadlan bixi sharraxaad ku jirta luuqad kale marka shayga la abuuro.
wikibase-property-description-edit-not-s: Sharraxaadaha laguma taageero luuqaddan. Fadlan bixi sharraxaad ku jirta luuqad kale marka sifada la abuuro.
wikibase-description-not-applicable-titl: Suurtagal ma aha in dhammaan luuqadaha loo dejiyo sharraxaad caadi ah
wikibase-aliases-edit-placeholder-langua: Geli magacyo kale oo ku jira $1
wikibase-aliases-edit-label: Magacyada kale, oo lagu kala saaray calaamadda dhuunta:
wikibase-content-language-edit-not-recog: Koodhka luuqadda la bixiyay lama aqoonsan.
wikibase-label-input-help-message: Geli calaamad shaygan ee ku jirta $1.
wikibase-entitytermsview-input-help-mess: Geli calaamada shaygan, sharraxaad gaaban iyo magacyo kale luuqad kasta.
wikibase-sitelinkgroupview-input-help-me: Ku dar xiriir goobeed adigoo cayimaya goob iyo bog ka tirsan goobtaas, wax ka beddel ama ka saar xiriirrada goobaha ee jira.
wikibase-sitelinks-empty: Ma jiro bog ku xiran shaygan.
wikibase-badgeselector-badge-placeholder: Guji si aad u qoondayso calaamad.
wikibase-partial-undo: Tafatirka qayb ahaan ayaa dib looga noqon karaa.
wikibase-omitted-undo-ops: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|isbeddel|isbeddello}} lama celin karo sababtoo ah {{PLURAL:$1|qiimuhu wuu|qiimayaashu way}} is beddeleen intii lagu jiray muddadaas.
wikibase-empty-undo: Ma jiro wax halkan dib looga noqon karo.
wikibase-undo-samerev: Laba nooc oo kala duwan waa in la cayimaa si dib looga noqdo tafatir.
wikibase-undo-nocontent: Lama soo shubi karo nuxurka nooca $2 ee bogga $1
wikibase-undo-redirect-latestredirect: Lama celin karo tafatir aan ahayn sii toosin haddii nooca ugu dambeeya uu yahay sii toosin
wikibase-undo-redirect-latestnoredirect: Lama celin karo tafatirka sii toosin haddii nooca ugu dambeeya uusan ahayn sii toosin
wikibase-summary-generated: Soo koobid (waxaa lagu dari doonaa soo koobid si otomaatig ah loo sameeyay):
wikibase-aliases-input-help-message: Si shaygan loo fududeeyo helitaankiisa, waxaad geli kartaa magacyo kale.
wikibase-claimview-snak-tooltip: Geli qiime u dhigma Sifada la yiraahdo "$1". Haddii Sifadu aysan lahayn qiime loo qoondeeyey ama qiimaha dhabta ah aan la garanayn, waxaad dooran kartaa nooc kale oo qiime ah adigoo gujinaya astaanta ka hor sanduuqa gelinta.
wikibase-claimview-snak-new-tooltip: Marka aad cayimto Sifo, waxaad geli kartaa qiime u dhigma. Haddii Sifadu aysan lahayn qiime loo qoondeeyey ama qiimaha dhabta ah aan la garanayn, waxaad dooran kartaa nooc kale oo qiime ah adigoo gujinaya astaanta ka hor sanduuqa gelinta.
wikibase-statementview-rank-tooltip-norm: Qiime sax ah, inkastoo laga yaabo inuu yahay mid taariikhi ah
wikibase-statementview-rank-tooltip-depr: Qiimaha waxaa la og yahay inuu khaldan yahay, laakiin (horey) si caadi ah ayaa loo aaminsanaa
wikibase-snakview-unsupportedsnaktype: Snak nooca "$1" ah. Maareynta Snak noocan ah weli lama taageero.
wikibase-snakview-variation-datavaluetyp: Khilaaf lama filaan ah ayaa ka dhex dhacay nooca Sifada "$2" iyo nooca qiimaha "$1".
wikibase-snakview-variation-nonewvaluefo: Suurtagal ma aha in qiime cusub loo qeexo Sifo la tirtiray.
wikibase-shortcopyrightwarning: Markaad gujiso "$1", waxaad oggolaanaysaa [[$2|shuruudaha isticmaalka]], sidoo kalena waxaad si aan laga noqon karin ugu raacsan tahay inaad ku sii dayso wax-ku-biirintaada iyadoo hoos imanaysa [$3 $4].
wikibase-shortcopyrightwarning-accept-pe: Waan aqbalayaa shuruudahan tafatirradayda mustaqbalka. Ha i tusin fariintan mar kale.
wikibase-copyrighttooltip-acknowledge: Waan aqbalayaa shuruudahan tafatirradayda mustaqbalka. Ha i tusin fariintan mar kale.
wikibase-anonymouseditwarning: Digniin: Ma aadan gelin akoonka. [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IP_address Cinwaankaaga IP-ga] si guud ayaa loo arki doonaa haddii aad samayso wax tafatir ah. Haddii aad [$1 gasho akoonka] ama [$2 samaysato akoon], tafatirradaada waxaa loo nisbayn doonaa magac isticmaale, iyadoo ay jiraan faa'iidooyin kale.
wikibase-anonymouseditwarning-message: Hadda cinwaankaaga IP-ga si guud ayaa loo arki doonaa haddii aad samayso wax tafatir ah. Haddii aad gasho akoonka ama aad samaysato akoon, tafatirradaada waxaa loo nisbayn doonaa magacaaga isticmaale, iyadoo ay jiraan faa'iidooyin kale.
wikibase-anonymouseditnotificationtempus: Haddii aad gasho akoonka ama aad samaysato akoon, tafatirradaada waxaa loo nisbayn doonaa magacaaga isticmaale, iyadoo ay jiraan faa'iidooyin kale.
wikibase-anonymouseditwarning-dismiss-pe: Iiga dig mar kasta oo aanan gelin.

wikibase-validator-bad-url: URL-ada looma oggola inay ku jiraan jilayaal gaar ah ama calaamadaha sida meelaha bannaan iyo qaansooyinka labajibbaaran: $1
wikibase-validator-url-scheme-missing: URL-kaan waxaa ka maqan qaab dhisameedka sida "https://": $1

wikibase-validator-sitelink-conflict: Xiriirka $1 horey ayaa loogu isticmaalay Shayga $2. Waxaad ka saari kartaa $2 haddii uusan halkaas ku habboonayn ama waxaad isku dari kartaa Shayada haddii ay ku saabsan yihiin isla mowduuca saxda ah.
wikibase-validator-sitelink-conflict-red: Xiriirka $1 horey ayaa loogu isticmaalay Shayga $2. Waxaad ka saari kartaa $2 haddii uusan halkaas ku habboonayn ama waxaad isku dari kartaa Shayada haddii ay ku saabsan yihiin isla mowduuca saxda ah. Haddii xaaladdu ka sii adag tahay, fadlan eeg [https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Sitelinks#Linking_to_Wikimedia_site_pages Help:Xiriirrada goobaha].
wikibase-validator-sitelink-conflict-unk: Xiriirka $1 waxaa sidoo kale isticmaalaya Shay kale oo hadda la kaydinayo.
wikibase-validator-label-conflict: Sifada $3 horey ayay ugu lahayd summadda "$1" oo la xiriirta koodhka luuqadda $2.
wikibase-validator-label-with-descriptio: Shayga $3 horey ayuu ugu lahaa summadda "$1" oo la xiriirta koodhka luuqadda $2, isagoo adeegsanaya isla qoraalka sharraxaadda.
wikibase-validator-label-equals-descript: Calaamada iyo sharraxaadda ee koodhka luuqadda $1 ma yeelan karaan isla qiimaha.
wikibase-validator-label-no-entityid: Calaamadu ma noqon karto aqoonsi shay oo sax ah.
wikibase-validator-illegal-string-chars: Qoraalku waa inuusan ku bilaaban ama ku dhammaan meel bannaan, sidoo kalena waa inuusan ku jirin meel bannaan oo toosan ama calaamado tab ah: $1
wikibase-validator-illegal-file-chars: Magacyada faylasha looma oggola inay ku jiraan xarfo sida laba-dhibcood ama jiirad
wikibase-validator-illegal-geo-shape-tit: Qiimuhu waa inuu ku bilaabmaa Data: kuna dhammaadaa .map. Sidoo kale cinwaanku waa inuusan ku jirin xarfo sida laba dhibcood, calaamadda ama dhuunta.
wikibase-validator-illegal-tabular-data-: Qiimuhu waa inuu ku bilaabmaa Data: kuna dhammaadaa .tab. Sidoo kale cinwaanku waa inuusan ku jirin xarfo sida laba-dhibcood, calaamadda ama dhuunta.
wikibase-validator-no-such-sitelink: Lama heli karo sitelink ku xiran "$1" marka la isku dayayo in wax laga beddelo calaamadaha.
wikibase-validator-no-mul-descriptions: Koodhka luuqadda ee "mul" ($1) waxaa loo isticmaali karaa oo keliya calaamadaha iyo magacyada kale, looma isticmaali karo sharraxaadaha.
wikibase-validator-not-a-language: "$1" ma aha koodh luuqadeed la yaqaan.

wikibase-wbui2025-editable-snak-value-pr: Waxaa loo soo bandhigi doonaa sida:

wikibase-wikibaserepopage-invalid-langco: Koodhka luuqadda "$1" lama aqoonsan. Fadlan isticmaal koodh luuqadeed uu nidaamku yaqaan, sida "so".
wikibase-wikibaserepopage-pipe-in-alias: Magacyada kale ee ay ku jiraan dhuumo waxaa lagu tafatiri karaa oo keliya bogga shayga laftiisa (iyadoo JavaScript la hawlgeliyey) ama iyada oo loo marayo API-ga
wikibase-wikibaserepopage-invalid-id: Aqoonsiga "$1" lama yaqaan nidaamka. Fadlan isticmaal aqoonsi shay oo sax ah.

wikibase-availablebadges-emptylist: Ma jiraan calaamado loo habeeyey wikigan.
wikibase-itembytitle-lookup-fieldset: Ka raadi Shayada adigoo adeegsanaya goobta iyo cinwaanka
wikibase-itembytitle-error-site: Fadlan isticmaal aqoonsi goob oo jira, tusaale ahaan "sowiki" ee Wikipedia Soomaaliga.
wikibase-itembytitle-error-item: Lama helin Shay ku xiran bogga la bixiyey.
wikibase-itembytitle-create: Waxaad sidoo kale [$1 abuuri kartaa Shay].
wikibase-itembytitle-summary:
Special:ItemByTitle waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu helo Shayga u dhigma bog la bixiyey oo ku yaal goob ku xiran.
Goobta koowaad, "{{int:wikibase-itembytitle-lookup-site}}", waa meesha aad ku gelinayso luuqadda iyo koodhka goobta.
Goobta labaad, "{{int:wikibase-itembytitle-lookup-page}}", waa inaad gelisaa cinwaanka saxda ah ee bogga sida uu uga muuqdo goobta ku xiran.
wikibase-gotolinkedpage-lookup-fieldset: Ugu dub bogga ku xiran adigoo adeegsanaya goobta iyo Shayga
wikibase-gotolinkedpage-summary:
Special:GoToLinkedPage waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu helo bogga Shay ku yaal goob ku xiran.
Goobta koowaad, "{{int:wikibase-gotolinkedpage-lookup-site}}", waa meesha aad ku gelinayso luuqadda iyo koodhka goobta.
Goobta labaad, "{{int:wikibase-gotolinkedpage-lookup-item}}", waa inaad gelisaa aqoonsiga Shayga aad raadinayso.
wikibase-gotolinkedpage-error-page-not-f: Lama helin bog ku habboon isku darka Shayga iyo goobtaas
wikibase-gotolinkedpage-error-item-id-in: Aqoonsiga Shayga ee la geliyey ma aha mid sax ah
wikibase-itemdisambiguation-lookup-field: Ka raadi Shayada adigoo adeegsanaya luuqadda iyo calaamada
wikibase-itemdisambiguation-form-hints: Ogsoonow in aan la soo bandhigi doonin wax ka badan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|natiijo|natiijooyin}}.
wikibase-itemdisambiguation-nothing-foun: Waan ka xunnahay, lama helin Shay leh calaamadaas.
wikibase-itemdisambiguation-invalid-lang: Waan ka xunnahay, koodhka luuqadda aad bixisay lama yaqaan nidaamka. Fadlan isticmaal koodh luuqadeed sax ah sida "so".
wikibase-itemdisambiguation-description: Qiimayaasha loo isticmaalo raadinta waa inay noqdaan qoraalka oo dhammaystiran ee la geliyey. Luuqaddu waa aqoonsi, sida "so".
wikibase-itemdisambiguation-summary: Raadi dhammaan Shayada leh isla calaamada saxda ah.
wikibase-newproperty-summary:
Hubi inaad baarto haddii Sifadu horey u jirto!
Waa inaad u samaysaa {{int:Wikibase-label-helppage|summad}} iyo {{int:Wikibase-description-helppage|sharraxaad}} dhammaan Sifooyinka cusub, sidoo kalena waa inaad dejisaa nooca Sifada oo sax ah.
wikibase-newproperty-invalid-datatype: Nooca xogta la cayimay ma aha mid sax ah.
wikibase-newproperty-insufficient-data: Waa inaad buuxisaa ugu yaraan mid ka mid ah: calaamada, sharraxaadda ama magacyada kale.
wikibase-newitem-summary:
Hubi inaad [[Special:Search|baarto haddii Shaygu horey u jiro]]!
Waa inaad u samaysaa {{int:Wikibase-label-helppage|summad}} iyo {{int:Wikibase-description-helppage|sharraxaad}} dhammaan Shayada cusub.
wikibase-newitem-site: Goobta bogga ugu horreeya ee ku xiran
wikibase-newitem-page: Magaca bogga ugu horreeya ee ku xiran
wikibase-newitem-not-recognized-siteid: Aqoonsiga goobta la bixiyey lama aqoonsan.
wikibase-newitem-same-label-and-descript: Calaamada iyo sharraxaaddu ma yeelan karaan isla qiimaha.
wikibase-newproperty-same-label-and-desc: Calaamada iyo sharraxaaddu ma yeelan karaan isla qiimaha.
wikibase-newitem-insufficient-data: Waa inaad buuxisaa ugu yaraan mid ka mid ah: summadda, sharraxaadda ama magacyada kale.
wikibase-setlabel-introfull: Waxaad dejinaysaa summadda ku jirta $2 ee [[:$1]].
wikibase-setlabel-intro: Foomkan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad dejiso calaamada shayga. Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad bixiso aqoonsiga shayga (tusaale Q23), koodhka luuqadda (tusaale "so") iyo calaamada la dejinayo.
wikibase-setdescription-introfull: Waxaad dejinaysaa sharraxaadda ku jirta $2 ee [[:$1]].
wikibase-setdescription-intro: Foomkan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad dejiso sharraxaadda shay. Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad bixiso aqoonsiga shayga (tusaale Q23), koodhka luuqadda (tusaale "so") iyo sharraxaadda la dejinayo.
wikibase-setaliases-introfull: Waxaad dejinaysaa magacyada kale ee ku jira $2 ee [[:$1]]. Magacyo kale oo badan waxaa lagu kala soocaa calaamadda dhuunta (|).
wikibase-setaliases-intro: Foomkan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad dejiso magacyada kale ee shayga. Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad bixiso aqoonsiga shayga (tusaale Q23), koodhka luuqadda (tusaale "so") iyo magacyada kale ee la dejinayo. Magacyo kale oo badan waxaa lagu kala soocaa calaamadda dhuunta (|).
special-setlabeldescriptionaliases: Deji calaamada, sharraxaadda iyo magacyada kale ee Shayga/Sifada
wikibase-setlabeldescriptionaliases-intr: Waxaad dejinaysaa summadda, sharraxaadda iyo magacyada kale ee ku jira $2 ee [[:$1]]. Magacyo kale oo badan waxaa lagu kala soocaa calaamadda dhuunta (|).
Foomkan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad dejiso summadda, sharraxaadda iyo magacyada kale ee shayga. Marka hore waa inaad bixisaa aqoonsiga shayga (tusaale "Q23") iyo koodhka luuqadda (tusaale "so").
wikibase-setlabeldescriptionaliases-subm: Deji summadda, sharraxaadda iyo magacyada kale
wikibase-setsitelink-introfull: Waxaad dejinaysaa xiriirka goobta ee $2 ee [[:$1]].
wikibase-setsitelink-intro: Foomkan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad dejiso xiriirka goobta ee Shay. Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad bixiso aqoonsiga Shayga (tusaale Q23), aqoonsiga goobta (tusaale "sowiki") iyo xiriirka goobta la dejinayo.
wikibase-setsitelink-intro-badges: Sidoo kale waxaad dejin kartaa calaamado kala duwan oo loogu talagalay xiriirkan goobta kuwaas oo hoos ku taxan.
wikibase-setsitelink-invalid-site: Aqoonsiga goobta "$1" lama yaqaan. Fadlan isticmaal aqoonsi goob oo jira, sida "sowiki".
wikibase-mergeitems-intro: Haddii aad isku darto laba Shay, dhammaan summadaha, sharraxaadaha, magacyada kale, xiriirrada goobaha iyo bayaannada waxaa laga wareejin doonaa hal Shay loona wareejin doonaa kan kale.
wikibase-mergeitems-success: $1 waxaa lagu daray $3 waxaana loo leexiyey halkaas.
wikibase-itemmerge-redirect: Shayadan waxaa laga yaabaa in horey la isugu daray.
wikibase-itemmerge-not-item: Shayga la cayimay ma aha Shay.
wikibase-itemmerge-failed-modify: Isku darka Shayada wuu fashilmay, fadlan marka hore xalli khilaafaadka jira.
wikibase-itemmerge-cant-merge-self: Lama isku dari karo Shay isla naftiisa.
wikibase-itemmerge-cant-create-temp-user: Lama abuuri karo isticmaale ku meel gaar ah
wikibase-tokencheck-missingtoken: Calaamadda tafatirka ayaa loo baahan yahay.
wikibase-tokencheck-mustposttoken: Tafatiriddu waxay suurtagal tahay oo keliya iyadoo la adeegsanayo codsiyada POST.
wikibase-tokencheck-badtoken: Calaamadda tafatirka waa khaldan tahay (laga yaabee in fadhigaagu dhacay).
wikibase-dispatchstats-intro:
Boggan wuxuu bixiyaa tirakoobyo ku saabsan dirista isbeddellada ee macaamiisha.
Wiki-ga macmiilka waxaa lagu wargeliyaa isbeddel ka dhacay {{SITENAME}} marka isbeddelka lagu diro wikigaas, isla markaana safka shaqooyinka ee wikigaas uu farsameeyo ogeysiiskaas.
wikibase-dispatchstats-empty-queue: Ma jiraan wax isbeddello ah oo ku jira safka Dirista Isbeddellada.
wikibase-dispatchstats-oldest: Isbeddelka ugu da'da weyn ee aan weli la dirin wuxuu ka yimid $1.
wikibase-dispatchstats-newest: Isbeddelka ugu cusub ee aan weli la dirin wuxuu ka yimid $1.
wikibase-dispatchstats-estimate: Waxaa jira qiyaastii  {{PLURAL:$1|isbeddello $1 oo aan weli la dirin}}.
special-listdatatypes: Liiska dhammaan noocyada xogta la heli karo
wikibase-listdatatypes-intro: Tani waa liiska dhammaan noocyada xogta oo ay la socdaan noocyada qiimaha u dhigma ee laga heli karo rakibaaddan:
wikibase-listproperties-legend: Hel liiska Sifooyinka adigoo adeegsanaya nooca xogta
wikibase-listproperties-invalid-datatype: "$1" ma aha nooc xog oo sax ah.
wikibase-entitydata-not-found: Lama helin wax shay ah oo leh aqoonsiga $1.
wikibase-entitydata-not-acceptable: Lama helin qaab ku habboon. Noocyada MIME ee la taageerayo: $1
wikibase-entitydata-bad-revision: Lama muujin karo dib u eegista $2 ee shayga $1.
wikibase-entitydata-bad-flavor: Nooca $1 ma aha mid sax ah: waa inuu noqdaa {{PLURAL:$2|{{#commaseparatedlist:$3}}|mid ka mid ah {{#commaseparatedlist:$3}}}}.
wikibase-entitydata-rdf-not-available: Soo saarista RDF hadda lama heli karo shayada nooca: $1. Fadlan halkii ka codso qaabka JSON.
wikibase-entitydata-unsupported-format: Qaabka xogta $1 laguma taageero is dhexgalkan.
wikibase-entitydata-text:
Boggan wuxuu bixiyaa is dhexgal xog isku xiran oo loogu talagalay qiimayaasha shayga. Fadlan ku bixi aqoonsiga shayga URL-ka adigoo adeegsanaya habka bog hoosaadka.
* Wada xaajoodka nuxurka ayaa lagu dabaqaa iyadoo lagu salaynayo madaxa Accept ee macmiilkaaga. Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay in xogta shayga lagu bixin doono qaabka uu doorbidayo macmiilkaaga. Biraawsarka mareegta, tani waxay noqon doontaa HTML, taas oo sababi doonta in biraawsar kaaga loo leexiyo bogga caadiga ah ee shayga.
* Waxaad si cad u codsan kartaa qaab xog gaar ah adigoo ku daraya kordhinta faylka ku habboon aqoonsiga shayga: Q23.json wuxuu soo celin doonaa xogta qaabka JSON, Q23.ttl wuxuu soo celin doonaa RDF/Turtle, iyo wixii la mid ah. Qaababka la taageerayo waa: $1.
wikibase-entitydata-unresolvable-sub-ent: Lama xallin karo leexinta "$1". Shayga waalidka ah waxaa loo leexiyey "$2".
wikibase-entitypage-text: Boggan wuxuu u leexinayaa bogga shayga ee kaydka uu ka tirsan yahay. Fadlan ku bixi aqoonsiga shayga URL-ka adigoo adeegsanaya habka bog hoosaadka.
wikibase-error-entity-not-local: Nooca shayga $1 laguma tafatiri karo wikigan.
wikibase-error-entity-too-big: Shaygu aad buu u weyn yahay. Cabbirka ugu badan ee la oggol yahay ee shayga waa $1.
wikibase-parse-error: Qiime khaldan oo qaab dhismeedkiisu aan sax ahayn.
wikibase-parse-error-coordinate: Qiimaha isku duwaha ayaa qaab dhismeedkiisu khaldan yahay.
wikibase-parse-error-entity-id: Aqoonsiga shayga ayaa qaab dhismeedkiisu khaldan yahay.
wikibase-parse-error-quantity: Qiimaha tirada ayaa qaab dhismeedkiisu khaldan yahay.
wikibase-parse-error-time: Qiimaha waqtiga ayaa qaab dhismeedkiisu khaldan yahay.
wikibase-redirect-origin-not-empty: Lama abuuri karo leexin shay aan madhnayn oo ah $1
wikibase-redirect-cant-load-entity-conte: Lama heli karo nuxurka, dib u eegista waxaa laga yaabaa in la tirtiray.
wikibase-redirect-source-and-target-are-: Suurtagal ma aha in shay loo leexiyo isla naftiisa
wikibase-redirect-cant-redirect: Abuurista leexinta way fashilantay sababo farsamo awgood.
wikibase-redirect-cant-create-temp-user: Lama abuuri karo isticmaale ku meel gaar ah
wikibase-mylanguagefallbackchain-text: Silsiladda beddelka luuqadda ee loo isticmaalo in lagu muujiyo calaamada shayada adiga ayaa hoos lagu muujiyey.
wikibase-mylanguagefallbackchain-babel: Waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa adigoo ku qoraya <nowiki>{{#babel: }}</nowiki> {{GENDER:$1|boggaaga}} [[Special:MyPage|isticmaalaha]].
wikibase-api-claim-value-missing: Qiime waa in la bixiyaa marka la abuurayo sheegasho leh snak-ga PropertyValueSnak.
wikibase-api-claim-value-unexpected: Ma bixin kartid qiime marka la abuurayo sheegasho aan lahayn PropertyValueSnak oo ah snak-ga ugu weyn.
wikibase-api-cant-load-entity-content: Lama geli karo nuxurka, dib u eegista waxaa laga yaabaa in la tirtiray.
wikibase-api-unresolved-redirect: Aqoonsiga shayga la bixiyey wuxuu tilmaamayaa leexin, taas oo aan lagu taageerin xaaladdan.
wikibase-api-editconflict: Khilaaf tafatir ayaa dhacay. Lama samayn karin sixitaanka dib u eegista hadda jirta.
wikibase-api-failed-modify: Isbeddelka lagu sameeyey Shayga wuu fashilmay.
wikibase-api-illegal-entity-remove: Shayada lama tirtiri karo iyadoo la bixinayo furaha heerka sare ee <var>remove</var>.
wikibase-api-illegal-id-or-site-page-sel: Waa inaad bixisaa midkood aqoonsiga <var>id</var> ee shayga, ama isku darka <var>site</var> iyo <var>page</var>, laakiin labadaba ma aha.
wikibase-api-illegal-ids-or-sites-titles: Bixi midkood "ids" Shayada ama lammaanaha "sites" iyo "titles" ee bogga u dhigma.
wikibase-api-inconsistent-language: Luuqad aan iswaafaqsanayn "$1" ayaa la ogaaday (waxaa la filayey "$2").
wikibase-api-inconsistent-site: Goob aan iswaafaqsanayn ayaa la ogaaday.
wikibase-api-invalid-guid: guid sheegashada ma aha mid sax ah.
wikibase-api-invalid-json: Json-ka ku jira codsiga ma aha mid sax ah.
wikibase-api-invalid-snak: Xogta snak-ga ma aha mid sax ah.
wikibase-api-invalid-list: Xogta liiska ma ahan mid sax ah.
wikibase-api-invalid-property-id: Aqoonsiga Sifada ma aha mid sax ah.
wikibase-api-invalid-entity-id: Aqoonsiga shayga ma aha mid sax ah.
wikibase-api-no-external-page: Goobta macmiilka dibadda "$1" ma bixin xogta bogga ee bogga "$2".
wikibase-api-nosuchrevid: Dib u eegis leh aqoonsiga lama helin.
wikibase-api-no-such-entity-link: Lama helin Shay ay ku jirto xiriir goobeedka goobta iyo magaca bogga la bixiyey.
wikibase-api-no-such-sitelink: Lama helin xiriir goobeed loogu talagalay "$1" markii la isku dayayey in la tafatiro calaamadaha.
wikibase-api-not-supported: Astaanta la codsaday ma taageerto shayga la bixiyey.
wikibase-api-not-recognized-datatype: Nooca xogta ayaa la filayey, laakiin wuu maqan yahay ama lama aqoonsana.
wikibase-api-not-recognized-siteid: Aqoonsiga goobta la bixiyey lama aqoonsan.
wikibase-api-not-recognized-array: Liis ayaa la filayey, laakiin lama aqoonsan.
wikibase-api-not-recognized-language: Koodhka luuqadda "$1" ee la bixiyey lama aqoonsan.
wikibase-api-not-recognized-string: Xarig ayaa la filayey, laakiin lama aqoonsan.
wikibase-api-param-missing: Halbeegga loo baahan yahay "$1" ayaa maqan.
wikibase-api-param-illegal: Waxaa la isticmaalay isku-dar aan sax ahayn oo halbeegyo ah.
wikibase-api-permissiondenied: Ma haysatid oggolaanshaha loo baahan yahay si aad u fuliso tallaabadan.
wikibase-api-wrong-class: Nooca fasalka ee khaldan ayaa la ogaaday.
wikibase-api-tags-invalid: Halbeegga calaamadaha ma aha mid sax ah.
wikibase-api-target-not-empty: Leexinta waxaa lagu abuuri karaa oo keliya dusha shay madhan ama la tirtiray.
wikibase-api-target-is-redirect: Meesha loo leexinayo waa inaysan sidoo kale ahayn leexin.
wikibase-api-target-is-incompatible: Isku dayga leexinta wuxuu ku wajahan yahay shay leh nooc ka duwan.
wikibase-api-cant-redirect: Lama abuuri karo leexin (waxaa laga yaabaa in leexinta u dhexeysa shayada noocyadan ah aan gabi ahaanba la taageerin).
wikibase-api-invalid-formatter-options-l: "options" aan sax ahayn ayaa la bixiyey: "lang" waa inuu noqdaa xarig (koodhka luuqadda ee MediaWiki).
wikibase-api-invalid-formatter-options-a: "options" aan sax ahayn ayaa la bixiyey: "applyRounding" waa inuu noqdaa bool ama xarig.
"options" aan sax ahayn ayaa la bixiyey: "applyUnit" waa inuu noqdaa bool.
wikibase-api-invalid-formatter-options-s: "options" aan sax ahayn ayaa la bixiyey: "showcalendar" waa inuu noqdaa bool ama "auto".
wikibase-api-invalid-formatter-options-u: "options" aan la taageerin ayaa la bixiyey: Ikhtiyaarka aan la aqoon ee "$1" ayaa la gudbiyey.
wikibase-self-conflict-patched: Tafatirkaaga waxaa lagu daray nooca ugu dambeeyay, iyadoo laga dul qoray qaar ka mid ah isbeddelladaadii dhexe.
wikibase-conflict-patched: Tafatirkaaga waxaa lagu daray nooca ugu dambeeyay.
wikibase-save-unresolved-redirect: Waxaa la helay leexin aan la xallin oo ka timid $1 kuna socota $2 intii la isku dayayey in isbeddel la kaydiyo.
wikibase-entity-summary-restore: Soo celi dib u eegista [[Special:Permalink/$3|$3]] ee uu sameeyey [[Special:Contributions/$4|{{GENDER:$4|$4}}]] ([[User talk:$4|wadahadal]])
wikibase-entity-summary-undo: Ka noqo dib u eegista [[Special:Diff/$3|$3]] ee uu sameeyey [[Special:Contributions/$4|{{GENDER:$4|$4}}]] ([[User talk:$4|wadahadal]])
wikibase-no-direct-editing: Tafatirka tooska ah waa naafo laga dhigay meel magaca $1
wikibase-noentity: Qaybtan ma jirto. Waxaad [{{fullurl:{{#Special:Log}}|page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} ka raadin kartaa diiwaannada la xiriira] si aad u ogaato halka ay tagtay.
wikibase-noentity-createone: Waxaad sidoo kale [[$1|abuuri kartaa mid cusub]].
wikibase-special-mergeitems-error-prefix: Shayada lama isku dari karin. Khaladka soo socda ayaa dhacay:
wikibase-listdatatypes-wikibase-item-bod: Xiriirinta Shayada kale ee mashruuca. Marka qiime la geliyo, magaca goobta "Shay" ee mashruuca ayaa la baari doonaa si loo helo Shayada u dhigma.
wikibase-listdatatypes-wikibase-property: Xiriirinta Sifooyinka mashruuca. Marka qiime la geliyo, magaca goobta "Sifo" ee mashruuca ayaa la baari doonaa si loo helo Sifooyinka u dhigma.
wikibase-listdatatypes-commonsmedia-body: Xiriirinta faylasha ku kaydsan Wikimedia Commons. Marka qiime la geliyo, magaca goobta "Fayl" ee Commons ayaa la baari doonaa si loo helo faylasha u dhigma.
wikibase-listdatatypes-globe-coordinate-:
Xog dhab ah oo ku saabsan meel juqraafiyeed oo lagu bixiyey lammaane lool iyo dhirir ah oo ku jira gms ama darajooyin jajab ah ee jirka cirka la siiyey. Sida caadiga ah waxay ku noqotaa "Dhulka" ka dibna "WGS84". Waxay ku darsataa saxnaanta iyo baaxadda.

* loolka – qaybta koowaad ee qarsoon (sabeyn, dms, dm, dd) ee xarigga isku duwaha, jihaduna waxaa lagu bixiyaa calaamad hore ama N/S gadaal lagu daray
* dhererka – qaybta labaad ee qarsoon ee xarigga isku-duwaha (sabeyn, dms, dm, dd), jihaduna waxaa lagu bixiyaa calaamad hore ama E/W gadaal lagu daray
* caalami – qiime xogeed cad (?) oo lagu bixiyey sida jir cirka ah, kaas oo sida caadiga ah ah Dhulka "http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q2"
* saxnaanta – tirooyinka ee isku duwaha
wikibase-listdatatypes-geo-shape-body: Xiriirinta xogta khariidadaha juqraafiyeed ee lagu kaydiyey Wikimedia Commons (ama wiki kale oo la habeeyey). Ka eeg "https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Map_Data" si aad u hesho dukumeenti dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan xogta khariidadaha.
wikibase-listdatatypes-tabular-data-body: Xiriiriyaha xogta shantaysan ee ku kaydsan Wikimedia Commons (ama wiki kale oo qaabaysan). Eeg "https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Tabular_Data" wixii dukumentiyo dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan xogta shantaysan.
wikibase-listdatatypes-quantity-body:
Goob xogeed oo dhab ah oo loogu talagalay tiro la xiriirta nooc ka mid ah unug si fiican loo qeexay. Unugga dhabta ah wuxuu ku jiraa qiyamka xogta la geliyo.

* qadar – qayb qarsoon oo ka mid ah xarigga (isku xirka horgalaha unugga ma cadda)
* Unug – qayb qarsoon oo ka mid ah xarigga oo u dhiganta "1" si caadi ah (isku xirka hay'adda jaangooynta ma cadda)
* Xadka sare. – xadka sare ee tirada
* xadka hoose – xadka hoose ee tirada
wikibase-listdatatypes-monolingualtext-b:
Goob xogeed oo dhab ah oo loogu talagalay xarig aan loo turjumin luuqado kale. Noocan xarigga ah hal mar ayaa la qeexaa waxaana dib loogu isticmaalaa dhammaan luuqadaha. Isticmaalka caadiga ah waxaa ka mid ah magacyada juqraafiyeed ee ku qoran luuqadda deegaanka, aqoonsayaal noocyo kala duwan ah, qaacidooyinka kiimikada, iyo magacyada sayniska ee Laatiinka.

* luuqad – qiime cad oo lagu aqoonsanayo luuqadda qaybta qoraalka
* qiime – cad oo loogu talagalay nooca xarigga ee ku xiran luuqadda
wikibase-listdatatypes-multilingualtext-:
Goob xogeed oo dhab ah oo loogu talagalay xarig ay tahay in loo turjumo luuqado kale. Isticmaalka caadiga ah waa magaca shay caalami ahaan muhiim ah oo leh qaabab qoraal oo aan maxalli ahayn. Kuwani waxay ku kala duwanaan karaan luuqadaha iyo nidaamyada qoraalka.

* luuqad – qiime cad oo lagu aqoonsanayo luuqadda qaybta qoraalka
* qiime – cad oo loogu talagalay nooca xarigga ee ku xiran luuqadda
wikibase-listdatatypes-string-body:
Goobta xogta dhabta ah ee taxanaha jilayaasha. Sida caadiga ah waxaa loo adeegsadaa aqoonsiyada leh qaabab qoran oo aan ku xirnayn luuqadda akhristaha.
* qiimaha – qiimaha muuqda ee deegaanka luuqadda u gaarka ah
wikibase-listdatatypes-time-body:
Goobta xogta dhabta ah ee bar-waqtiyeedka. Waxaa loo bixiyaa sidii taariikh iyo saacad leh saxnaan iyo xuduuddo cayiman. Waqtiga waxaa gudaha loogu kaydiyaa habka jadwalka ee la tilmaamay.
* waqtiga – qiimaha muuqda ee bar waqtiyeedka, kaas oo loo matalo sumad-waqti u eg ISO 8601, tusaale +2013-01-01T00:00:00Z. Sannadku had iyo jeer wuxoo wataa calaamad (kadar ama kajar) waana la buuxiyaa si uu u yeesho inta u dhaxaysa 4 illaa 16 god.
* aag-saacadoodka – qiimaha muuqda oo ah seasabax sumadaysan. Xogta aag-saacadoodka oo ah weecashada UTC ee daqiiqado ahaan.
* horay – qiimaha seasabax ee muuqda oo muujinaya inta halbeeg ee ay dib uga dhici karto waqtiga la bixiyey. Halbeegga waxaa gooni u astaysanaya saxnaanta.
* gadaal – qiimaha seasabax ee muuqda oo muujinaya inta halbeeg ee ay ka horrayn karto waqtiga la bixiyey. Halbeegga waxaa gooni u astaysanaya saxnaanta.
* saxnaanta – qiimaha muuqda ee ku dhex caysan shortint. Lambaradu waxay leeyihiin macnaha soo socda: 0 - bilyan sano, 1 - boqol milyan sano, ..., 6 - kun sano, 7 - qarni, 8 - toban sano, 9 - sano, 10 - bil, 11 - maalin, 12 - saac, 13 - daqiiqo, 14 - ilbiriqsi.
* hab-jadvaleedka – qiimaha muuqda ee loo bixiyey sidii URI. Wuxuu aqoonsadaa habka jadwalka ee sumad waqtiga.
wikibase-listdatatypes-url-body: Goobta xogta dhabta ah ee URL. URL-ada waxaa lagu xaddiday hab-maamuusyada ay sidoo kale taageeraan xiriirinta dibadda ee wikitext-ka.
wikibase-listdatatypes-external-id-body: Goobta xogta dhabta ah ee aqoonsiga dibadda. Aqoonsiyada dibadda waxaa si otomaatig ah loogu xiriirin karaa il xogeed awood u leh bandhigga.
wikibase-listdatavaluetypes-generalbody: Nooca qiimaha ee noocan xogta waa $1.
wikibase-concept-uri-tooltip: URI-ga aqoonsanaya fikradda uu Shaygani sharaxayo
wikibase-pageimage-helptext: Sawirkan waxaa laga soo qaatay bayaannada Shaygan. Waxaad hagaajin kartaa sawirka adigoo beddelaya bayaanka.
action-item-term: Beddel ereyada Shayga (summadaha, sharaxaadaha, magacyada kale)
right-item-term: Beddel ereyada Shayga (calaamadaha, sharaxaadaha, magacyada kale)
action-property-term: Beddel ereyada Sifada (calaamadaha, sharaxaadaha, magacyada kale)
right-property-term: Beddel ereyada Sifada (calaamadaha, sharaxaadaha, magacyada kale)
wikibase-entity-not-viewable-title: Nooca nuxurka isma waafaqayo: Lama soo bandhigi karo nuxurka
wikibase-entity-not-viewable: Nuxurka la bixiyey ee nooca "$1" ma aha Shay, sidaas darteed Wikibase ma soo bandhigi karo.
wikibase-pageinfo-wb-identifiers: Tirada bayaannada aqoonsayaasha dibadda ee ku jira shaygan
wikibase-search-namespace-mix: Isku darka magacyada goobaha Shayga iyo maqaalka ee raadinta hadda lama taageero. Kaliya meel magacyada Shayada ayaa la raadin doonaa.
wikibase-search-config-notfound: Qaabeynta raadinta qoraalka buuxa lama helin: $1
wikibase-search-config-badclass: Fasalka dhisaha weydiinta waa khaldan yahay: $1
wikibase-refresh-for-missing-datatype: Nooca xogta $1 lagama helin fariinta macmiilka ee deegaanka. Tani waxay ka dhalan kartaa khalkhal dhanka xogta kaydsan. Fadlan dib u cusboonaysii biraawsarkaaga adoo dhaafaya kaydka deegaanka (Ctrl-Shift-R ama Cmd-Shift-R badankeeda biraawsarada) si loo xalliyo dhibaatada.
wikibase-outdated-client-script: Hoogay, waxaa loo baahan yahay dib u cusboonaysiin adag!
wikibase-entity-save-error-message: Isbeddelkaaga lama daabici karo. Waxaad isku dayi kartaa inaad markale gujiso badanka daabacaada.
wikibase-tainted-ref-popper-text: Qiimaha bayaankan waa la beddelay, laakiin tixraacu sidiisii ayuu ahaa. Waad ka saari kartaa digniintan haddii tixraacu weli sax yahay.
wikibase-tainted-ref-popper-title: Waxaa suurtagal ah in tixraaca iyo qiimuhu aysan iswaafaqsanayn
wikibase-tainted-ref-tainted-icon-title: Bayaankan wuxuu leeyahay arrimo suurtagal ah.
wikibase-setclaim-warning-duplicatemains: Snak-ga ugu weyn oo nuqul ah ayaa la ogaaday. Bayaan lama darin.
wikibase-editentity-warning-serializeres: Lama samayn karin xogta shayga si loogu gudbiyo natiijada.
wikibase-federated-properties-search-api: Sifooyinka si ku meel gaar ah looma heli karo.
wikibase-federated-properties-save-api-e: Kaydintaadu way fashilantay sababtoo ah codsi loo diray wiki-ga isha federaalka ayaa fashilmay.
wikibase-federated-properties-source-wik: Bayaannada ku saabsan Shaygan si ku meel gaar ah looma heli karo sababtoo ah codsi loo diray wiki-ga isha federaalka ayaa fashilmay. Fadlan dib u cusboonaysii bogga.
wikibase-federated-properties-special-li: Wikibase-kan wuxuu isticmaalaa Sifooyin federaal ah oo ka imanaya ilo dibadeed. Waxaad geli kartaa $1.
wikibase-federated-properties-leaving-si: Tani waa Sifo federaal ah. Waxaa laguu leexin doonaa $1 si aad u aragto faahfaahinteeda.
Ha ii muujin farriintan mar dambe
wikibase-federated-properties-edit-reque: Ma tafatiri kartid bayaankan sababtoo ah codsi loo diray wiki-ga isha federaalka ayaa fashilmay.
special-setlabeldescriptionaliases-param: Deji $1 calaamada, sharaxaadda iyo magacyada kale
wikibase-federated-properties-federated-: Ma la falgeli kartid Sifooyinka Federaalka adigoo isticmaalaya API-kan.
wikibase-federated-properties-failed-req: Codsigu wuu fashilmay sababtoo ah codsi loo diray wiki-ga isha federaalka ayaa fashilmay.
wikibase-scoped-search-search-entities-d: Hel noocyo kala duwan oo shayada {{SITENAME}} ah
wikibase-mobile-editing-ui-beta-feature-: Tafatir Shayada Wikidata ee aaladaha moobilka

Daar astaantan si aad uga tafatirto Wikidata aaladdaada moobilka! Mashruucan horumarintiisu socoto ee ka socda Kooxda Wikidata wuxuu awood kuu siinayaa inaad Shayada kaga tafatirto taleefankaaga casriga ah adigoo helaya khibrad ku habboon moobilka.
